// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (b): inline branch and
// spec-dir/reviews composition outside the waist. Every chain here
// must be flagged as UNAUDITED.
package fixture

func inlineBeadConcat(x string) string {
	// A new "bead/"+x concat — the gate.go:447 shape.
	return "bead/" + x
}

func inlineReviewsConcat(specID, slug string) string {
	// G1's shape: ".mindspec/specs/"+specID+"/reviews/"+slug.
	return ".mindspec/specs/" + specID + "/reviews/" + slug
}
